{{Infobox character
| name = Brani
| introduced = cradle-13-threshold
}}

== Threshold: Stories from Cradle ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Brani]] is a [[Twin Messenger]] who can temporarily exist in two places at once.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c5">''Threshold: Stories from Cradle'', chapter 5</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Brani]] is a Worldweaver.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c5" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Brani]] is a scout on [[Zeth]]'s team.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c5" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Brani]] uses a bow.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c5" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:Threshold: Stories from Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle characters]]
